area.value: any number of creatures in a 30-ft.-radius burst

description.value: All targets are rendered silent, as per silence. The silence affects the entirety of each creature but does not extend beyond. However, the silence is one-wayâsounds from outside the creatures’ spaces can still enter. Quieted creatures gain a +10 circumstance bonus on Stealth checks.
